evals.prompt: Match Sarah's CV against our Senior Product Manager JD.
evals.expected_output: Finds context, candidate, and JD, runs enhanced FIT match, presents fit score with strengths, gaps, and recommendations.

assertions.name: gets_jd
assertions.description: Calls atlas_list_jds to get the JD

assertions.name: runs_fit_match
assertions.description: Calls atlas_fit_match_enhanced for single candidate match

assertions.name: shows_score
assertions.description: Presents fit score (0-100) with strengths and gaps

evals.prompt: Rank all my candidates against the Engineering Lead JD.
evals.expected_output: Finds context and all candidates, uses atlas_start_fit_rank to rank multiple candidates, polls until complete, presents ranked results.

assertions.name: finds_candidates
assertions.description: Calls atlas_list_candidates to get all candidates

assertions.name: runs_ranking
assertions.description: Calls atlas_start_fit_rank with multiple candidate IDs
